◎简　　介  

　　A documentary detailing the restoration process of the landmark film Metropolis as well as the film's troubled history. From American Film Distributors making drastic edits to the film, to WWII in Europe, and finally the dangerous nature of nitrocellulose film. All converging against the historic film.
